info.title: Quantussy Prepared Snare
info.description: 4 sound types mapped to separate hits.
info.comment: Created while testing dk.regressorcreate~ with audio from output C.

setttings.fftsettings: 256 64 512 for the small size. medium is 512 64 1024 and when analyzing the largest window (22050) it's 2048 128 2048 (all relative to a 44.1k sample rate). this only applies to the internal parallel descriptor analysis.
setttings.descriptors: mean of loudness, deriv of loudness, mean of centroid, deriv of centroid, mean of flatness, deriv of flatness, mean of pitch, pitch confidence
setttings.comment: 8d of descriptors for the built-in parallel audio analysis of descriptor input for when being used to drive the regressor with audio input
